chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-2130 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 13.11.2025 Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocates for the petitioner Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG --------- Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner seeks promotion from the post of Assistant Superintendent Prison (BS-16) to the post of Deputy Superintendent Prison (BS-17). The Additional Chief Secretary, Home Department and the Inspector General of Prisons / Respondents No.3 and 4, if any vacancy exists, shall call a meeting of Departmental Promotion Committee (DPC) expeditiously and consider case of the petitioner for promotion in accordance with law and the relevant rules. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Additional Chief Secretary, Home Department and the Inspector General of Prisons / Respondents No.3 and 4, for compliance. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
